Level 7 start button

:alarm_clock: - You have 20 minutes to resolve the outage, good luck! You can type `/help` if you need any reminders.
Hey team, I'm texting from the board room - kinda embarrassing but in my demo to the board, I tried to add a pair of Aviator sunglasses to the shopping cart and I got a ?http 500?
I've bought some time but need this be able to do this demo if we can lets get this sorted in the next 20 minutes.
500 screenshot
uh oh, those Aviators are top sellers due to the new Top Gun movie...It's size up the issue time Zach Davis
Come on this can't be happening!
I'm in this meeting so, wont be able to help but I trust that you all can get this fixed asap, just @ me if you need anything
ok looking into this now
Acknowledged Tinus - checking if I get the same error
:star: Reproduces the incident
I couldn't reproduce. Anyone else?
Confirming I can successfully purchase the glasses
:star: Attempt to replicate the issue
Could it be the change issue, perhaps?
Are there any reports from customers or around the business?
Checking reports
:star: Asking questions to validate impact of the problem
I'll check recent changes Shay
:star: Check changes done to the platform
No reports regarding the platform or service issues. I will keep an eye in case i get any
:bulb: Hint: Declare an incident.

On the recent deployed changes, I can see Daniel deployed CheckoutService:version 5.0 whilst Shayshortly after deployed CheckoutService:version 4.6. Is there a reason why you deployed an older version Shay?
I will check to make sure it didn't break anything
Declaring a minor /incident
Let me check
- Severity - Low
*Incident Number INC100045:* - Severity - Low
:star: Incident record created
:star: Send first comms in first 5 minutes
:star: Formally assign criticality level to the incident
I must have been a typo that was supposed to be 5.6 version. My bad
Please revert your change
:star: Restoration over root cause analysis
Can we have more information on this? What's the business and customer impact?
Sure, reverting
I can't see any issues with my change and service looks healthy
Still no reports!
Rollback complete. Is it any better?
:bulb: Use metrics as evidence
Tinus - can you test again please
Sorry guys but I'm getting the same error. I need this to be fixed ASAP! I'm stalling as much as i can
:bulb: Hint: keep the business informed regularly
So what do we know so far?
OK. Tanya- can see your change was deployed to PROD - could you revert please
It's safe to do so but ad service wouldn't impact the cart or catalog service
Currently just Tinus impacted. No reports from elsewhere and none of us can replicate
What other team / expert do we recommend checking in with on this?
We need to get this sorted as soon as possible as this meeting is very important for our company
We might ask tinus for more information
So as far as we know this is only affecting 1 user, right?
i think so
Tinus - as this appears just isolated to yourself - can you either refresh your cache or re-launch the page please?
I will try to refresh my session but I'm open to more suggestions
It could be a local issues with his session, machine or browser
Any news on this?
Yep agreed Daniel
refreshing didn't help. Any other suggestions @Team ?
can you try another browser?
Tinus - try another browser
Only have one on my work laptop. Not an option
Try clearing the cache or incognito
I will try that
Damn! thats it
Great Ive got to do my presentation now, thanks for figuring this out so quickly. @daniel @shay can you look in to a cache busting solution?
it was the cache! sure we can do that
no worries boss, at least its not a significat issue
good luck with the presentation!
yes good luck @tinus
good luck @tinus!
Start retro and feedback
